Subject: Important Market Information regarding the OMAR-Online Market
Message:
Greetings,

Attached please find the OMAR-Online Market Simulation Plan and updated
automation specifications.  A revision history is included at the beginning
of each automation specification, including a description of the changes.

The Market Simulation will be conducted from February 11 through 15, 2002.  

The OMAR-Online application enhances features currently provided through the
MDAS-Online application.

You may contact me at (916) 351-2330 or at lfeusi@caiso.com should you have
any questions.
